title: S13: Complete Propose CLI — Resource Config + Secrets Subcommands
intent: Wire the remaining 6 ProposalChange kinds to CLI propose subcommands so operators can configure fs_roots, net_allowlist, exec_root, secrets, and secret mode through the governed proposal flow. Add --secret-value and --secret-passphrase to the approve command so redacted secrets can be re-supplied at approval time. This completes the IOME feature slice: all modules are now end-to-end invocable via CLI.
